'''Gorrul Wyke''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who worked for [[Tern Ashandrik]]. He was often responsible for picking up supplies for Ashandrik's base on [[Seregar]] from [[Sutloo's Trading Post]] every few weeks.

==Appearances==
